title: Experiences of Social and Health Services in Finland during COVID-19 Pandemic 2020
description: The dataset consists of texts on experiences of visiting social and health services in Finland during the COVID-19 pandemic. The writers were people aged over 18 residing in Finland who had visited social and/or health services during the coronavirus pandemic. The described visits included all visits which the writers thought had been impacted by the coronavirus situation at the time, not only visits related to coronavirus infections or suspected infections.
